descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeated Pembroke Lumber Kings 4-1 in Centennial Cup junior-A tournament play.
descriptionLong: Richmond Sockeyes scored three third-period goals to defeat Pembroke Lumber Kings 4-1 on May 5, 1987, in Humboldt, Saskatchewan during the Centennial Cup junior-A championship tournament. Dave Tomlinson scored twice and Stan Czenczek added the winning goal. The victory gave Richmond a 2-0 record and a share of first place with Humboldt Broncos in the four-team roundrobin.

attribution.headline: Richmond Sockeyes Win 4-1 Over Pembroke in Centennial Cup Tournament
